message:
feat(secrets): add fallback provider with file-based secrets

Add FileProvider that reads secrets from /etc/stockyard/ directory,
and FallbackProvider that tries multiple providers in order. The daemon
now tries 1Password first, falling back to file-based secrets when
1Password CLI isn't available (e.g., when running as root).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
